description: Instruction fetch stage - generates PC and fetches from IMEM

ports.name: pc_redirect
ports.description: PC redirect enable (from EX for branch, from ID for JAL/JALR)

ports.name: if_pc
ports.description: Current PC sent to IF/ID pipeline register

ports.name: if_instr
ports.description: Fetched instruction sent to IF/ID pipeline register

ports.name: if_valid
ports.description: Instruction valid signal sent to IF/ID pipeline register

functionality: Manages the program counter (PC) to fetch instructions from the instruction memory. On reset, PC is initialized; otherwise, on each cycle without stall, the PC updates to pc_target if pc_redirect is asserted (branches or jumps), or increments by 4. Stalls hold the PC and output; flushes invalidate the current instruction (if_valid = 0). Outputs the current PC, fetched instruction, and a valid flag to the IF/ID register.
